case_title: MICHAEL FUSARO VS. ERNEST R PALENCIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUSARO, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT PALENCIA, ERNEST R

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALENCIA, ERNEST R THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 300 VICKSBURG STREET, APT. 2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $219.80 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PALENCIA, ERNEST R
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $45.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUSARO, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALENCIA, ERNEST R $4,305.00 PRINCIPAL, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $219.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,299.80, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5299.80. SEE SCANNED DOC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PALENCIA, ERNEST R
